Scan once. Know everything.

The fastest way to discover your rarest Pokemon

✓ Trusted by 150K+ Pokemon trainers

📱

App Scanning Demo

Unify your Pokemon knowledge

PokeRarityScanner combines real-time OCR scanning, visual analysis, and advanced algorithms to give you instant insights into your Pokemon collection.

⚡Instant rarity scoring
🎯CP/HP detection
✨Shiny recognition
📊Advanced analytics

How It Works

Four simple steps to master your Pokemon collection

⚫

Scan

Point, tap, and capture any Pokemon card instantly with our overlay widget

⚙️

Analyze

AI-powered OCR reads all card details including CP, HP, date, and species

⭐

Score

Get instant rarity analysis from 1-100 with detailed breakdowns

📋

Organize

Build and manage your perfect collection with scan history

5-Step Process

From screenshot to rarity score in seconds

1

Start App

Launch PokeRarityScanner and grant screen capture permission

2

Open Pokemon

Navigate to any Pokemon card in Pokemon GO

3

Tap Pokéball

Click the floating red Pokéball overlay to scan

4

Get Results

Receive instant rarity analysis with full breakdowns

5

See Score

View your Pokemon rarity ranking 1-100

Loved by Trainers Worldwide

Join thousands of happy users

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know

PokeRarityScanner supports all 1000+ Pokemon from Pokemon GO, including all generations and regional variants.

150K+ Trainers are already scanning

Join the fastest-growing Pokemon rarity community

✓ Free forever with basic features

✓ Premium features available ($2.99/month)

✓ Web Dashboard & Desktop App coming soon
